summary: Phase 5 (Integration and Polish) complete. All 9 tasks executed across 8 atomic commits. Created AGENTS.md append helper with section markers, wired detectFramework() into runInit auto-detection flow, persisted tooling/framework metadata in harness.config.json (both CLI and MCP), updated initialize-project SKILL.md documentation, and added comprehensive e2e tests for all 10 frameworks + 5 bare language scaffolds + existing project overlay. Test count grew from 129 to 171 with zero regressions.
learnings: buildFrameworkSection needs framework key in output for test assertions (titles like 'Next.js' don't contain 'nextjs')
MCP resultToMcpResponse omits isError on success -- use toBeFalsy() not toBe(false)
Existing project overlay tests must not use force:true or AGENTS.md gets overwritten before append logic runs
Post-write config patching works identically in CLI and MCP handlers -- both read harness.config.json, patch tooling/framework, strip level:null, write back
